response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with discussions about healthcare and COVID vaccines.
response_parsed.opinion:
It is important to approach discussions about healthcare and COVID vaccines with empathy, respect, and an open mind. Here are some tips on how to manage and deal with these types of discussions: 
Firstly, listen actively and try to understand the other person's perspective without interrupting or judging. Show genuine interest in their thoughts and feelings, and avoid making assumptions or jumping to conclusions. 
Secondly, be open-minded and willing to consider different viewpoints. Avoid being rigid in your beliefs and be willing to change your mind if presented with new information or arguments. 
Thirdly, be respectful and empathetic towards others, even if you disagree with their opinions. Avoid using aggressive language or personal attacks, and focus on the topic at hand. 
Fourthly, stay informed and up-to-date on current research and developments in the field of healthcare and COVID vaccines. This will help you to make informed decisions and provide evidence-based arguments when necessary. 
Lastly, be willing to compromise and find common ground with others. Focus on finding solutions that work for everyone, rather than trying to win an argument or prove a point. By following these tips, you can manage and deal with discussions about healthcare and COVID vaccines in a productive and respectful manner.
